question: Based on the chart data, between which two years did online orders increase by the larger amount?

options.D: The changes between these pairs of years are all about the same

explanation: The chart uses a non-linear (inappropriate) y-axis scaling function, so equal vertical distances do not correspond to equal changes in the underlying values. That can make one period look like it changed more even when the data show otherwise. 2016-2018: 309 → 573 (+264); 2021-2023: 985 → 1471 (+486).
